text: Ḥā, Meem.
tl: Haa-Meeem

text: By the clear Book,
tl: Wal-Kitaabil Mubeen

text: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur’ān that you might understand.
tl: Innaa ja'alnaahu Quraanan 'Arabiyyal la'allakum ta'qiloon

text: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom.
tl: Wa-innahoo feee Ummil Kitaabi Ladainaa la'aliyyun hakeem

text: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?
tl: Afa-nadribu 'ankumuz Zikra safhan an kuntum qawman musrifeen

text: And how many a prophet We sent among the former peoples,
tl: Wa-kam arsalnaa min Nabiyyin fil awwaleen

text: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.
tl: Wa-maa ya'teehim min Nabiyyin illaa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: And We destroyed greater than them in [striking] power, and the example of the former peoples has preceded.
tl: Fa-ahlaknaaa ashadda minhum batshanw Wa-madaa masalul awwaleen

text: And if you should ask them, \"Who has created the heavens and the earth?\" they would surely say, \"They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,\"
tl: Wa-la'in sa-altahum man khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda la-yaqoolunna khalaqa-hunnal 'Azeezul 'Aleem

text: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided
tl: Allazee ja'ala lakumul arda mahdanw Wa-ja'ala lakum feehaa subulan la'allakum tahtadoon

text: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -
tl: Wallazee nazzala minas samaaa'i maaa'an biqadarin fa-ansharnaa bihee baldatan maitaa' kazaalika tukhrajoon

text: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount
tl: Wallazee khalaqal azwaaja kullahaa Wa-ja'ala lakum minal fulki wal-an'aami maa tarkaboon

text: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say, \"Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it.
tl: Litastawoo 'alaa zuhoorihee summa tazkuroo ni'mata Rabbikum izas tawaitum 'alaihi Wa-taqooloo Subhaanal lazee sakhkhara lana haaza Wa-maa kunnaa lahoo muqrineen

text: And indeed we, to our Lord, will [surely] return.\"
tl: Wa-innaaa ilaa Rabbinaa lamunqaliboon

text: But they have attributed to Him from His servants a portion. Indeed, man is clearly ungrateful.
tl: Wa-ja'aloo lahoo min 'ibaadihee juz'aa; innal insaana la-kafoorun mubeen

text: Or has He taken, out of what He has created, daughters and chosen you for [having] sons?
tl: Amit takhaza mimmaa yakhluqu banaatinw Wa-asfaakum bilbaneen

text: And when one of them is given good tidings of that which he attributes to the Most Merciful in comparison [i.e., a daughter], his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.
tl: Wa-izaa bushshira ahaduhum bimaa daraba lir-Rahmaani masalan zalla wajhuhoo muswaddanw Wa-huwa kazeem

text: So is one brought up in ornaments while being during conflict unevident [attributed to Allāh]?
tl: Awa-maien yunashsha'u fil hilyati Wa-huwa fil khisaami ghairu mubeen

text: And they described the angels, who are servants of the Most Merciful, as females. Did they witness their creation? Their testimony will be recorded, and they will be questioned.
tl: Wa-ja'alul malaaa'ikatal lazeena hum 'ibaadur Rahmaani inaasaa; 'a-shahidoo khalqahum; satuktabu shahaadatuhum Wa-yus'aloon

text: And they said, \"If the Most Merciful had willed, we would not have worshipped them.\" They have of that no knowledge. They are not but misjudging.
tl: Wa-qaaloo law shaaa'ar Rahmaanu maa 'abadnaahum; maa lahum bizaalika min 'ilmin in hum illaa yakhrusoon

text: Or have We given them a book before it [i.e., the Qur’ān] to which they are adhering?
tl: Am aatainaahum Kitaaban min qablihee fahum bihee mustamsikoon

text: Rather, they say, \"Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are in their footsteps [rightly] guided.\"
tl: Bal qaalooo innaa wajadnaaa aabaaa'anaa 'alaaa ummatinw Wa-innaa 'alaaa aasaarihim muhtadoon

text: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, \"Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following.\"
tl: Wa-kazaalika maaa arsalnaa min qablika fee qaryatim min nazeerin illaa qaala mutrafoohaaa innaa wajadnaaa aabaaa'anaa 'alaaa ummatinw Wa-innaa 'alaaa aasaarihim muqtadoon

text: [Each warner] said, \"Even if I brought you better guidance than that [religion] upon which you found your fathers?\" They said, \"Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers.\"
tl: Qaala awa-law ji'tukum bi-ahdaa mimmaa wajatdtum 'alaihi aabaaa'akum qaalooo innaa bimaaa ursiltum bihee kaafiroon

text: So We took retribution from them; then see how was the end of the deniers.
tl: Fantaqamnaa minhum fanzur kaifa kaana 'aaqibatul mukazzibeen

text: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when Abraham said to his father and his people, \"Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship
tl: Wa-iz qaala Ibraaheemu li-abeehi Wa-qawmiheee innanee baraaa'un mimmaa ta'budoon

text: Except for He who created me; and indeed, He will guide me.\"
tl: Illal lazee fataranee fa-innahoo sa-yahdeen

text: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].
tl: Wa-ja'alahaa kalimatan baaqiyatan fee 'aqibihee la-'allahum yarji'oon

text: However, I gave enjoyment to these [people of Makkah] and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear Messenger.
tl: Bal matta'tu haaa'ulaaa'i Wa-aabaaa'ahum hattaa jaaa'a-humul haqqu Wa-Rasoolun mubeen

text: But when the truth came to them, they said, \"This is magic, and indeed we are, concerning it, disbelievers.\"
tl: Wa-lammaa jaaa'ahumul haqqu qaaloo haazaa sihrunw Wa-innaa bihee kaafiroon

text: And they said, \"Why was this Qur’ān not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities?\"
tl: Wa-qaaloo law-laa nuzzila haazal Quraanu 'alaa rajulin minal qaryataini 'azeem

text: Do they distribute the mercy of your Lord? It is We who have apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of this world and have raised some of them above others in degrees [of rank] that they may make use of one another for service. But the mercy of your Lord is better than whatever they accumulate.
tl: A-hum yaqsimoona rahmata Rabbik; Nahnu qasamnaa bainahum ma'eeshatahum fil hayaatid dunyaa Wa-rafa'naa ba'dahum fawqa ba'din darajaatin li-yattakhiza ba'duhum ba'dan sukhriyyaa; Wa-rahmatu Rabbika khairun mimmaa yajma'oon

text: And if it were not that the people would become one community [of disbelievers], We would have made for those who disbelieve in the Most Merciful - for their houses - ceilings and stairways of silver upon which to mount.
tl: Wa-law-laaa aien yakoonan naasu ummatanw waahidatan laja'alnaa limaien yakfuru bir-Rahmaani li-buyootihim suqufan min fiddatinw Wa-ma'aarija 'alaihaa yazharoon

text: And for their houses - doors and couches [of silver] upon which to recline
tl: Wa-li-buyootihim abwaabanw Wa-sururan 'alaihaa yattaki'oon

text: And gold ornament. But all that is not but the enjoyment of worldly life. And the Hereafter with your Lord is for the righteous.
tl: Wa-zukhrufaa; Wa-in kullu zaalika lammaa mataa'ul hayaatid dunyaa; wal-aakhiratu 'inda Rabbika lilmuttaqeen

text: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.
tl: Wa-maien ya'shu 'an zikrir Rahmaani nuqaiyid lahoo Shaitaanan fahuwa lahoo qareen

text: And indeed, they [i.e., the devils] avert them from the way [of guidance] while they think that they are [rightly] guided
tl: Wa-innahum la-yasuddoo-nahum 'anis sabeeli Wa-yahsaboona annahum muhtadoon

text: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], \"How I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west; and what a wretched companion.\"
tl: Hattaaa izaa jaaa'anaa qaala yaa-laita bainee Wa-bainaka bu'dal mashriqaini fabi'sal qareen

text: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment.
tl: Wa-lai yanfa'akumul Yawma iz zalamtum annakum fil 'azaabi mushtarikoon

text: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muḥammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?
tl: Afa-anta tusmi'us summa aw tahdil 'umya Wa-man kaana fee dalaalin mubeen

text: And whether [or not] We take you away [in death], indeed, We will take retribution upon them.
tl: Fa-immaa nazhabanna bika fa-innaa minhum muntaqimoon

text: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.
tl: Aw nuriyannakal lazee wa'adnaahum fa-innaa 'alaihim muqtadiroon

text: So adhere to that which is revealed to you. Indeed, you are on a straight path.
tl: Fastamsik billazeee oohiya ilaika innaka 'alaa Siraatin Mustaqeem

text: And indeed, it is a remembrance for you and your people, and you [all] are going to be questioned.
tl: Wa-innahoo la-zikrun laka Wa-liqawmika Wa-sawfa tus'aloon

text: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?
tl: Was'al man arsalnaa min qablika mir Rusulinaaa 'a-ja'alnaa min doonir Rahmaani aalihatany yu'badoon

text: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, \"Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds.\"
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa Moosaa bi-aayaatinaaa ilaa Fir'awna Wa-mala'ihee faqaala innee Rasoolu Rabbil 'aalameen

text: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them.
tl: Falamma jaaa'ahum bi-aayaatinaaa izaa hum minhaa yadhakoon

text: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].
tl: Wa-maa nureehim min aayatin illaa hiya akbaru min ukhtihaa Wa-akhaznaahum bil'azaabi la'allahum yarji'oon

text: And they said [to Moses], \"O magician, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. Indeed, we will be guided.\"
tl: Wa-qaaloo yaaa ayyuhas saahirud'u lanaa Rabbaka bimaa 'ahida 'indaka innanaa lamuhtadoon

text: But when We removed from them the affliction, at once they broke their word.
tl: Falammaa kashafnaa 'anhumul 'azaaba izaa hum yankusoon

text: And Pharaoh called out among his people; he said, \"O my people, does not the kingdom of Egypt belong to me, and these rivers flowing beneath me; then do you not see?
tl: Wa-naadaa Fir'awnu fee qawmihee qaala yaa-qawmi alaisa lee mulku Misra Wa-haazihil anhaaru tajree min tahtee afalaa tubsiroon

text: Or am I [not] better than this one [i.e., Moses] who is insignificant and hardly makes himself clear?
tl: Am ana khairun min haazal lazee huwa maheenunw Wa-laa yakaadu yubeen

text: Then why have there not been placed upon him bracelets of gold or come with him the angels in conjunction?\"
tl: Falaw-laa ulqiya 'alaihi aswiratun min zahabin aw jaaa'a ma'ahul malaaa'ikatu muqtarineen

text: So he bluffed his people, and they obeyed him. Indeed, they were [themselves] a people defiantly disobedient [of Allāh].
tl: Fastakhaffa qawmahoo fa-ataa'ooh; innahum kaanoo qawman faasiqeen

text: And when they angered Us, We took retribution from them and drowned them all.
tl: Falammaaa aasafoonan taqamnaa minhum fa-aghraqnaahum ajma'een

text: And We made them a precedent and an example for the later peoples.
tl: Faja'alnaahum salafanw Wa-masalan lil-aakhireen

text: And when the son of Mary was presented as an example, immediately your people laughed aloud.
tl: Wa-lammaa duribab nu Maryama masalan izaa qawmuka minhu yasiddoon

text: And they said, \"Are our gods better, or is he?\" They did not present it [i.e., the comparison] except for [mere] argument. But, [in fact], they are a people prone to dispute.
tl: Wa-qaalooo 'a-aalihatunaa khairun am hoo; maa daraboohu laka illaa jadalaa; bal hum qawmun khasimoon

text: He [i.e., Jesus] was not but a servant upon whom We bestowed favor, and We made him an example for the Children of Israel.
tl: In huwa illaa 'abdun an'amnaa 'alaihi Wa-ja'alnaahu masalan li-Baneee Israaa'eel

text: And if We willed, We could have made [instead] of you angels succeeding [one another] on the earth.
tl: Wa-law nashaaa'u laja'alnaa minkum malaaa'ikatan fil ardi yakhlufoon

text: And indeed, he [i.e., Jesus] will be [a sign for] knowledge of the Hour, so be not in doubt of it, and follow Me. This is a straight path.
tl: Wa-innahoo la-'ilmun lis-Saa'ati fa-laa tamtarunna bihaa wattabi'oon; haazaa Siraatun Mustaqeem

text: And never let Satan avert you. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy.
tl: Wa-laa yasuddan-nakumush Shaitaanu innahoo lakum 'aduwwun mubeen

text: And when Jesus brought clear proofs, he said, \"I have come to you with wisdom [i.e., prophethood] and to make clear to you some of that over which you differ, so fear Allāh and obey me.
tl: Wa-lammaa jaaa'a 'Eesaa bilbaiyinaati qaala qad ji'tukum bil-Hikmati Wa-li-ubaiyyina lakum ba'dal lazee takhtalifoona feehi fattaqul laaha Wa-atee'oon

text: Indeed, Allāh is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. This is a straight path.\"
tl: Innal laaha Huwa Rabbee Wa-Rabbukum fa'budooh; haaza Siraatum Mustaqeem

text: But the denominations from among them differed [and separated], so woe to those who have wronged from the punishment of a painful Day.
tl: Fakhtalafal ahzaabu min bainihim fa-wailun lil-lazeena zalamoo min 'azaabi Yawmin aleem

text: Are they waiting except for the Hour to come upon them suddenly while they perceive not?
tl: Hal yanzuroona illas Saa'ata an ta'tiyahum baghtatanw Wa-hum laa yash'uroon

text: Close friends, that Day, will be enemies to each other, except for the righteous
tl: Al-akhillaaa'u Yawma'izin ba'duhum liba'din 'aduwwun illal muttaqeen

text: [To whom Allāh will say], \"O My servants, no fear will there be concerning you this Day, nor will you grieve,
tl: Yaa-'ibaadi laa khawfun 'alaikumul Yawma Wa-laaa antum tahzanoon

text: [You] who believed in Our verses and were Muslims.
tl: Allazeena aamanoo bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-kaanoo muslimeen

text: Enter Paradise, you and your kinds, delighted.\"
tl: Udkhulul Jannata antum Wa-azwaajukum tuhbaroon

text: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.
tl: Yutaafu 'alaihim bi-sihafin min zahabinw Wa-akwaab, Wa-feehaa maa tashtaheehil anfusu Wa-talazzul a'yunu Wa-antum feehaa khaalidoon

text: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do.
tl: Wa-tilkal jannatul lateee ooristumoohaa bimaa kuntum ta'maloon

text: For you therein is much fruit from which you will eat.
tl: Lakum feehaa faakihatun kaseeratun minhaa ta'kuloon

text: Indeed, the criminals will be in the punishment of Hell, abiding eternally.
tl: Innal mujrimeena fee 'azaabi jahannama khaalidoon

text: It will not be allowed to subside for them, and they, therein, are in despair.
tl: Laa yufattaru 'anhum Wa-hum feehi mublisoon

text: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers.
tl: Wa-maa zalamnaahum Wa-laakin kaanoo humuz zaalimeen

text: And they will call, \"O Mālik, let your Lord put an end to us!\" He will say, \"Indeed, you will remain.\"
tl: Wa-naadaw yaa-Maaliku liyaqdi 'alainaa Rabbuka qaala innakum maakithoon

text: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse.
tl: Laqad ji'naakum bilhaqqi Wa-laakinna aksarakum lil-haqqi kaarihoon

text: Or have they devised [some] affair? But indeed, We are devising [a plan].
tl: Am abramooo amran fainnaa mubrimoon

text: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers [i.e., angels] are with them recording.
tl: Am yahsaboona annaa laa nasma'u sirrahum Wa-najwaahum; balaa Wa-Rusulunaa ladaihim yaktuboon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers.\"
tl: Qul in kaana lir-Rahmaani walad; fa-ana awwalul 'aabideen

text: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.
tl: Subhaana Rabbis samaawaati wal-ardi Rabbil Arshi 'ammaa yasifoon

text: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.
tl: Fazarhum yakhoodoo Wa-yal'aboo hattaa yulaaqoo Yawmahumul lazee yoo'adoon

text: And it is He [i.e., Allāh] who is [the only] deity in the heaven, and on the earth [the only] deity. And He is the Wise, the Knowing.
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee fis samaaa'i ilaahunw Wa-fil ardi ilaah; Wa-Huwal Hakeemul 'Aleem

text: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.
tl: Wa-tabaarakal lazee lahoo mulkus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa Wa-'indahoo 'ilmus Saa'ati Wa-ilaihi turja'oon

text: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.
tl: Wa-laa yamlikul lazeena yad'oona min doonihish shafaa'ata illaa man shahida bilhaqqi Wa-hum ya'lamoon

text: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, \"Allāh.\" So how are they deluded?
tl: Wa-la'in sa-altahum man khalaqahum la-yaqoolun nallaahu fa-annaa yu'fakoon

text: And [Allāh acknowledges] his saying, \"O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe.\"
tl: Wa-qeelihee yaa-Rabbi inna haaa'ulaaa'i qawmul laa yu'minoon

text: So turn aside from them and say, \"Peace.\" But they are going to know.
tl: Fasfah 'anhum Wa-qul salaam; fasawfa ya'lamoon
